description: Basic equations and physical parameters of point reactor kinetics without feedback effects; the nuclear reactor as a total system; reactor excursions, Fuchs-Nordheim and Bethe-Tait models; space-time reactor dynamics; synthesis methods.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: N E 405, graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
